narrative: Insured reports total loss of contents in apartment fire on 2026-04-15. Contents inventory includes $42,000 in cash, $85,000 in jewelry, $30,000 untracked electronics. Coverage was increased from $50k to $200k contents 12 days before loss. No police report — insured states 'state doesn't require for fires < $50k' (incorrect). Witness statements conflict — one says fire started in bedroom, other says kitchen. Photos pre-date reported loss per EXIF metadata (taken 2026-04-01). 3 prior claims filed by claimant within past 18 months. Insurance Fraud Bureau warrant outstanding (ref IFB-2025-887). Repair invoice from local shop exceeds market rate by 80%. Shop on internal flag list.
